task_completion.description: Verify the agent has joined the correct meeting room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet interface is visible, and the room name 'MorningFitness' is visible in the browser address bar URL or the meeting header.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has set the correct display name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Coach Mara' is visible on the user's video tile, in the participant list, or in the pre-join screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the chat panel has been opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chat sidebar or chat window is open and visible within the Jitsi Meet interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct message has been typed into the chat input field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chat input box contains the text: 'Today's Workout: 3 rounds - 20 squats, 15 push-ups, 10 burpees. Rest 60s between rounds.' (or contains the key terms: '3 rounds', '20 squats', '15 push-ups', '10 burpees', '60s').

task_completion.description: Verify the message has been successfully sent to the chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The required message appears in the chat history area above the input box, indicating it was sent by 'Coach Mara'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to access Jitsi Meet.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser interface (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) is visible with the Jitsi Meet web application loaded, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions should be performed in the graphical user interface. There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands, API requests, or automated scripts executing the task.

integrity.description: Verify the message was sent in the actual chat interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The message must appear in the Jitsi Meet chat history panel, not just pasted into a notepad, terminal, or unrelated text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target meeting room is 'MorningFitness'. The required display name is 'Coach Mara'. The exact message to be sent is: 'Today's Workout: 3 rounds - 20 squats, 15 push-ups, 10 burpees. Rest 60s between rounds.' Key terms to look for in the message include: '3 rounds', '20 squats', '15 push-ups', '10 burpees', and '60s'.
